creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
When I start X Window on my T520 with FHD display, it comes up in a 960x540 resolution.

Looking at dmesg.boot, the start FB_INFO ... end FB_INFO section clearly shows that originally, the native display resolution has been detected correctly.

Looking at Xorg.0.log, the 1920x1080 DDC modeline is shown correctly.

Nevertheless Xorg appears in a mode with half of the actual display's dimensions and I have to add the native mode using xrandr addmode to make Xorg display in the correct resolution. (see the workaround hack: https://askubuntu.com/questions/1193045/wrong-resolution-missing-1920x1080-on-lenovo-w520-after-update-to-ubuntu-18-04 )

Seems to be a regression, but I lack the intimate knowledge to say whether it is a drm-kmod or intel driver issue.
